title: Suspicious sign-in alert
safe_steps: Ask user if sign-in was them.
Do not approve unexpected MFA prompts.
Change password through official process if suspicious.
advanced_steps: Revoke sessions, reset password, require MFA re-registration, review sign-in logs and mailbox rules.
do_not_do: Do not run destructive commands without approval.
Do not ask users to share passwords.
technician_notes: Confirm scope: one user, multiple users, or full site.
Record final fix into the client-specific KB.
